nasb.text: Then the Amorites forced the sons of Dan into the hill country, for they did not allow them to come down to the valley;

esv.text: The Amorites pressed the people of Dan back into the hill country, for they did not allow them to come down to the plain.

cnv.text: 亞摩利人強迫但人退回山地上，不容他們下到平原來。

ccb.text: 亚摩利人强迫但人住在山区，不准他们下到平原。
